<!--
    patholog v1 keeps a frozen public contract. New runtime behavior, commands,
    flags, JSON fields, config schema changes, or broader mutation need explicit
    compatibility and semver justification.
-->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the CLI behavior, JSON output, config policy, library API, docs, or tooling change you want. -->

```bash
# Optional command example
patholog doctor --json
```

## Motivation And Use Case

<!-- Why should this exist in patholog? Who benefits, and how often? -->

## Compatibility / Scope

- [ ] This fits within the documented v1 contract
- [ ] This needs a new command or flag
- [ ] This changes JSON output or documented exit codes
- [ ] This changes config schema or policy semantics
- [ ] This changes mutation behavior beyond the managed apply block
- [ ] This should stay out of scope for v1.x

- SPEC.md section:

<!-- Describe workarounds, existing commands, or narrower changes that may solve the same problem. -->

## Possible Downsides

<!-- List tradeoffs: v1 compatibility, JSON stability, cross-platform behavior, shell safety, package scope, or maintenance cost. -->

## Additional Context
